title: Waruga: Kutukan Ilmu Hitam
overview: After the death of his estranged father, Yamin inherits his father's old house. When he goes to visit the house with his wife, he finds a charming young girl named Anom living there, who he believes to be his father's adopted child. Yamin's wife is uncomfortable with Anom's presence and the fact that Yamin's father was a black magic practitioner.
